column4: cabin temp not broadcast remote (ign-off ECU sleep); v.e.cabintemp stale during remote clima
natural stop port 0x12 05->00; v.e.hvac drive from port 0x12 not 0x5EA remote_mode
BAP port 0x19 raw=(celsius-10)*10; bug: read cfg in CommandClimateControl not Ticker10 cache
OBC charge current AC — 2 caps 20260409 (raw, no analysis); cand 0x1A5554A8 b4
lock/unlock auth bytes — fob diff vs 0x5A7 idle (blocks lock PR)
min SoC BAP frame — change in head unit e-Manager, diff vs idle
UDS ign-on retry @ 500k+1M for all ECU addrs (ISO-TP std + VW TP2.0 + 7DF + 200/200)
schedule-trig clima: different BAP signaling, same port 0x12 stop detect
charge start/stop — min SoC 0%<->100%, diff vs idle
Type 2 AC charge cycle — 0 charge-only 11-bit IDs; OBC in 29-bit ext; primary 0x1A5554A8 b4 = 1Hz energy increment; needs ext-ID frame hook to decode
gear: 0x187 authoritative; 0x0B3 = drive-armed latch; 0x0B4 b3/4 torque cand (D/B only)
pedal: 0x365 b4b0 brake pressure; 0x3BE b3 brake sw; 0x3BE b5b0 throttle; DBC stubs added, re-confirm needed
drive: 0x0B2 wheel spd (1/128 km/h/bit, 4xLE16); 0x0B4 b3:4/b6:7 LE16 motor torque pairs; 0x057 b3 torque req
drive part c — wheel spd / torque pair confirmation (see cap 17 finding)
sustained regen coast — disambig torque vs power for 0x0B4 (b3,b4)
WOT accel — confirm MotorTorqueB on fwd load, check sign byte
clima verify deferred path: locked >=30s, start (wake + ~1s gap -> BAP), 10s, stop (NM linger + ACK ctr match) — 20260422 (4 caps)
clima verify direct path: unlock+door (bus awake), start (immediate BAP, no wake), 10s, stop — 20260422 (in same set as cap 18)
